label: CIS Safeguard 3.13
title: Deploy a Data Loss Prevention Solution

prose.en: Implement an automated tool, such as a host-based Data Loss Prevention (DLP) tool to identify all sensitive data stored, processed, or transmitted through enterprise assets, including those located onsite or at a remote service provider, and update the enterprise's data inventory.
An automated tool, such as a host-based Data Loss Prevention (DLP) tool, is implemented.
The data loss prevention solution identifies all sensitive data stored, processed, or transmitted through enterprise assets, including those located onsite or at a remote service provider.
As a result, the enterprise's data inventory is updated.
